text: The latest update did not improve battery life at all.
rationale: Tests whether the model picks up the negation cue or just the trigger word 'improve'

text: This app is no longer reliable on my phone.
rationale: Strong positive cue 'reliable' negated by 'no longer'; tests cue-vs-context handling

text: The team won the championship final last weekend.
rationale: Sports content unrelated to app-review training; tests domain-shift robustness

text: The new version does not crash anymore.
rationale: Double negation context; 'crash' is negative but 'not anymore' flips it to positive

text: I can not say this app has been helpful at all.
rationale: Negation of positive cue 'helpful'; tests if model ignores 'not' and reads 'helpful' as positive

text: The app never freezes on my device.
rationale: Tests whether 'never' as negation of negative cue 'freezes' is understood correctly

text: The app used to be fast but now it is painfully slow.
rationale: Positive cue 'fast' appears early but overall sentiment is negative; tests if model anchors on first cue

text: Excellent design but absolutely terrible performance.
rationale: Strong positive cue 'excellent' followed by strong negative; tests which cue dominates

text: I loved this app until they ruined it with the last update.
rationale: Past positive cue 'loved' but current sentiment is negative; tests temporal cue handling

text: Add two cups of flour and mix until the dough is smooth.
rationale: Recipe instruction with no app-review sentiment; tests domain-shift robustness

text: Inflation rose by three percent in the last quarter according to analysts.
rationale: Financial news prose unrelated to app reviews; tests domain-shift robustness

text: The court ruled in favor of the plaintiff after a two week trial.
rationale: Legal news sentence with no app sentiment; tests domain-shift robustness

text: Crashes always.
rationale: Extremely short review of two words; tests if model handles minimal context

text: Love it.
rationale: Very short positive review; tests if model can classify with almost no context

text: Ok.
rationale: Single ambiguous word review; tests model behavior at minimum possible length

text: I have been using this application every single day for the past six months and while the interface is clean and the syncing works most of the time I keep running into a frustrating bug where all my saved data disappears after every update which completely ruins the experience and makes me want to uninstall it.
rationale: Very long sentence mixing positive and negative signals; tests if model handles long context correctly

text: This app does everything I need it to do and more the design is beautiful the speed is impressive and I have never once encountered a bug or any kind of issue even after three major updates it just keeps getting better and I recommend it to everyone I know.
rationale: Very long positive review with no negative signals; tests model on long positive context

text: Oh great another update that broke everything again.
rationale: Sarcastic use of 'great'; surface form is positive but intended meaning is negative

text: Wow what an amazing app it only crashes five times a day.
rationale: Sarcastic 'amazing'; high crash frequency makes negative intent clear

text: Totally worth the premium price for an app that does absolutely nothing.
rationale: Sarcastic 'worth' and 'nothing'; tests if model detects sarcasm through contradiction

text: Sure the app deletes my files randomly but at least the icon looks pretty.
rationale: Sarcastic minimization of a serious flaw; tests if model catches implied negative sentiment

text: I just love spending an hour every morning fixing the sync errors this app creates.
rationale: Sarcastic 'love' applied to a clearly negative experience; tests surface vs intended sentiment

text: The app is okay I guess.
rationale: Highly hedged and uncommitted review; tests if model handles uncertainty and vagueness without defaulting to positive or negative

text: Some people like it some people don't.
rationale: Balanced and non-committal statement; tests if model handles ambiguous crowd opinion

text: First it was good then bad then good again.
rationale: Oscillating sentiment with no clear final polarity; tests model on mixed temporal signals

text: I switched from this app to a competitor and never looked back.
rationale: Implicit negative through abandonment with no explicit negative word; tests if model catches implied sentiment

text: My grandmother uses this app and she seems happy with it.
rationale: Indirect positive expressed through a third party; tests if model handles indirect sentiment attribution

text: The support team was not rude at all.
rationale: Negation of negative cue 'rude'; tests if model understands double negative resolving to positive

text: Best decision I ever made installing this app said no one ever.
rationale: Explicit sarcasm marker 'said no one ever'; tests if model catches meta-sarcasm cues

text: Horrible.
rationale: Single strong negative word; tests if model classifies correctly with absolute minimum context
